_description: HAR URL with different host matches parser.yaml resource by path
_parser_yaml:
downstream:
  format: table
  resource: /data.html
  tables:
    - selector:
        type: nth
        match: 0
      columns:
        - index: 0
          field: channel_id
          type: integer
        - index: 1
          field: frequency
          type: frequency
      channel_type:
        fixed: qam
